diagnosis: Registry param name 'packet_count' generated '--packet-count' CLI flag, but the playbook passes '--count'. Renamed the param to 'count' in the registry and updated the ICMPFloodAttack constructor accordingly.

files_changed.description: Renamed ParamDef 'packet_count' to 'count' in the icmp-flood entry so the generated CLI flag becomes '--count'
Renamed constructor parameter 'packet_count' to 'count'; updated internal reference and verbose log line to use the new name. Updated main() instantiation to pass count= instead of packet_count=.
Updated ICMPFloodAttack instantiation inside run() to pass count= instead of packet_count=
